string-array.name: hint_diamonds_paragraphs
string-array.item: Diamonds are used to build buildings and place furniture.
You can also buy bombs and scales with diamonds. They add attack and defense in expeditions.

string-array.name: hint_house_paragraphs
string-array.item: A house can be placed in a town. You can found a town on a free map.
An animal can live in a house. Inside, there are rooms and a garden bed.
You can place furniture in rooms. If there is a fridge in a room, the animal can cook there.
You can grow plants and collect supplies in the garden bed.

string-array.name: hint_fortress_paragraphs
string-array.item: A castle can be placed in a town. You can found a town on a free map.
An animal can live in a castle. Inside, there are rooms and a garden bed.
Next to a castle, there is not only a garden bed, but also a garden and a pond.
You can grow plants in the garden bed.
In the garden and pond, you can collect honey, fish, mushrooms, and other supplies.

resources.string: What to do with a free map

string-array.name: hint_free_map_paragraphs
string-array.item: You can found a town on a free map.
In a town, you can build houses, castles, and landmarks.
Animals can live in houses and castles. Nearby, you can grow plants and collect supplies.

string-array.name: hint_expedition_map_paragraphs
string-array.item: This area is occupied by monsters. You cannot found a town here yet.
To free the map, send an animal on an expedition.
Before the expedition, give the animal supplies, bombs, or scales. They add attack and defense points.

resources.string: What the garden and pond are for

string-array.name: hint_garden_item_paragraphs
string-array.item: Every castle has a garden and a pond nearby. You can collect useful supplies there.
For example: honey, apples, fish, or mushrooms.
Objects in the garden or pond do not disappear after you collect supplies.

string-array.name: hint_plant_paragraphs
string-array.item: A plant can be planted in a garden bed next to a house or castle.
When it grows, you can collect seeds or prepare supplies from it.
Supplies are useful in expeditions: they add attack or defense.

string-array.name: hint_furniture_paragraphs
string-array.item: Furniture can be placed in rooms inside houses and castles.
The fridge is especially important. If an animal lives in the house and there is a fridge in a room, the animal can cook there.

string-array.name: hint_recipe_paragraphs
string-array.item: Recipes let you cook complex supplies from simple ones.
Cooking is only possible in a room with a fridge.
Move an animal into a house and place a fridge in one of its rooms.

string-array.name: hint_location_paragraphs
string-array.item: Landmarks can be placed in a town.
You can go inside and see what is happening there.
Animals do not live in landmarks. They need houses or castles.
